title: PEERPLUS PEER DELIVERED SERVICES TRAINING - 211info
text: EUGENE DROP PEERPLUS PEER DELIVERED SERVICES TRAINING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides various trainings for service providers and community partners on youth/young adult issues and culture, collaborating with youth/young adults, peer-delivered services, how peer support works and how to integrate it, and how to bridge the gap between adult allies and youth/young adults. Also provides youth peer support specialist certification training (PeerPlus). Also provides trainings for youth/young adults on school-based peer-delivered services and for peer support specialists. 44 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Call for hours Email (541) 214-6514 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 517-9402 Person Jack Frederick, Program Manager Person (541) 214-6514 Crissy Oyervides [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Call for details. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 3pm-6pm Services: Workshops/Symposiums * Youth Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - DROP-IN CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PEER SUPPORT ORGANIZATIONAL DEVELOPMENT AND MANAGEMENT DELIVERY METHODS - CONSULTING AND TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE DROP
